events.text: Assessment complete — wrong bolt grade (head markings) is a fail/high-risk nonconformance under RCSC Specification, since incorrect grade fasteners can't reliably develop the required pretension/clamping force in a slip-critical or bearing connection. Written to `/app/answer.json` with corrective actions: quarantine the lot, verify MTRs, replace nonconforming bolts, and re-inspect before tensioning/close-out.
